description_long: This is a red and gray pickup truck with a classic boxy design, featuring a spacious open cargo bed at the rear and a two-door cab. The front end displays a prominent grille with horizontal slats, flanked by rectangular headlights and a robust bumper. The side profile reveals large black wheels, side mirrors, and a slightly raised rear cargo area with visible wheel wells. The rear view shows the open cargo bed with ribbed flooring and a tailgate, as well as a rear bumper and hitch. The windows are tinted black, and the truck has a solid, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban and suburban environments. The overall build suggests a vehicle designed for both personal and light-duty hauling purposes.
description: A red and gray two-door pickup truck with a spacious open cargo bed, black wheels, and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, bumper, and tinted windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door cab, black wheels, and open cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, ribbed flooring, tailgate, and rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, wheels, and cargo bed.
